3209720.name: Genso Manège Demo
3209720.description: Follow Emma for the first few chapters of her journey in this demo, as she fights to reawaken her magical powers in order to aid a unique cast of characters, all of whom are trapped inside a travelling amusement park. Having lost memories from youth, Emma must rediscover her past through love and friendship in this stunning dream-like fantasy otome.
3209720.supported_languages:
英语, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
